articles.title: Expedia Group to buy CarTrawler, rental-car engine for 70+ airlines
articles.summary: Expedia Group announced an agreement to acquire CarTrawler, an Ireland-based B2B platform specializing in car rental, ground transport, and insurtech solutions. This acquisition is a strategic move to enhance Expedia's B2B travel platform, offering broader distribution for suppliers and more comprehensive options for B2B partners and travelers. The transaction is expected to close in the second half of 2026, bolstering Expedia's offerings beyond lodging and activities.
articles.content: Expedia Group announced an agreement to acquire CarTrawler, an Ireland-based B2B platform specializing in car rental, ground transport, and insurtech solutions. The transaction is expected to close in the second half of 2026, bolstering Expedia's offerings beyond lodging and activities.

articles.title: New RTX system keeps battlefield data flowing even under jamming
articles.summary: RTX's BBN Technologies unit has successfully demonstrated PACE4ACE, a self-healing communications system designed for contested environments. Funded by the Air Force Research Laboratory, this system ensures continuous, secure data flow for combat air support by automatically rerouting traffic across various links when jamming occurs. This capability supports the U.S. Air Force's Agile Combat Employment concept, allowing dispersed units to maintain critical communication.
articles.content: RTX's BBN Technologies unit has successfully demonstrated PACE4ACE, a self-healing communications system designed for contested environments. Funded by the Air Force Research Laboratory, this system ensures continuous, secure data flow for combat air support by automatically rerouting traffic across various links when jamming occurs. This capability supports the U.S. Air Force's Agile Combat Employment concept, allowing dispersed units to maintain critical communication.

articles.title: UPST Investor Alert: Upstart Holdings Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Misleading on Model Performance: Levi & Korsinsky
articles.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert for Upstart Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPST), announcing a securities fraud lawsuit. Investors who purchased UPST securities between May 14, 2025, and November 4, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm, as they may be entitled to recover damages due to alleged misrepresentation regarding the company's AI underwriting model performance. The lawsuit claims Upstart's Model 22 overreacted to macroeconomic signals, leading to suppressed loan approvals and conversion rates, which resulted in a significant stock drop after corrective disclosures on No
articles.content: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert for Upstart Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPST), announcing a securities fraud lawsuit. Investors who purchased UPST securities between May 14, 2025, and November 4, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm, as they may be entitled to recover damages due to alleged misrepresentation regarding the company's AI underwriting model performance. The lawsuit claims Upstart's Model 22 overreacted to macroeconomic signals, leading to suppressed loan approvals and conversion rates, which resulted in a significant stock drop after corrective disclosures on November 4, 2025. The deadline to apply for lead plaintiff is June 8, 2026.

articles.title: Hard drives still provide most AI storage, Western Digital survey says
articles.summary: A Western Digital survey of its largest global customers and distributors reveals that enterprises prioritize proven reliability, predictable economics, and scalability for AI infrastructure. The survey indicates that HDDs remain foundational for AI-driven data growth due to their cost-effectiveness and capacity for long-term retention, with a significant majority of respondents operating HDD-majority infrastructure. This reinforces a shift towards designing AI infrastructure as a long-lived data system rather than just a high-performance compute environment.
articles.content: A Western Digital survey of its largest global customers and distributors reveals that enterprises prioritize proven reliability, predictable economics, and scalability for AI infrastructure. The survey indicates that HDDs remain foundational for AI-driven data growth due to their cost-effectiveness and capacity for long-term retention, with a significant majority of respondents operating HDD-majority infrastructure. This reinforces a shift towards designing AI infrastructure as a long-lived data system rather than just a high-performance compute environment.

articles.title: Dolby Recognized as 2025 Supplier of the Year and Overdrive Award Winner by General Motors
articles.summary: Dolby Laboratories has received General Motors' 2025 Supplier of the Year and the prestigious Overdrive Award, marking its first time earning these honors. This recognition highlights Dolby's innovation in redefining in-car entertainment through technologies like Dolby Atmos, which is now available in over 150 vehicle models and across Cadillac's 2026 EV lineup. The awards acknowledge suppliers for outstanding performance, partnership, and innovation that support GM's global operations and deliver world-class vehicles.
articles.content: Dolby Laboratories has received General Motors' 2025 Supplier of the Year and the prestigious Overdrive Award, marking its first time earning these honors. This recognition highlights Dolby's innovation in redefining in-car entertainment through technologies like Dolby Atmos, which is now available in over 150 vehicle models and across Cadillac's 2026 EV lineup. The awards acknowledge suppliers for outstanding performance, partnership, and innovation that support GM's global operations and deliver world-class vehicles.

articles.title: AI to assist trip planning: inside Expedia’s new B2B platform
articles.summary: Expedia Group B2B has launched an AI-powered platform and toolkit to help companies integrate travel experiences into their customer offerings. This initiative, unveiled at the Explore 26 partner conference, includes an Intelligent Experience Platform with composable AI components and expands ground mobility solutions through the acquisition of CarTrawler. The goal is to simplify travel integration for partners, reduce development time, and enhance marketing capabilities, all while emphasizing responsible AI governance.
articles.content: Expedia Group B2B has launched an AI-powered platform and toolkit to help companies integrate travel experiences into their customer offerings. This initiative, unveiled at the Explore 26 partner conference, includes an Intelligent Experience Platform with composable AI components and expands ground mobility solutions through the acquisition of CarTrawler. The goal is to simplify travel integration for partners, reduce development time, and enhance marketing capabilities, all while emphasizing responsible AI governance.

articles.title: Phillips 66 to add Permian gas processing, USGC fractionation capacities
articles.summary: Phillips 66 is expanding its midstream capabilities with two new projects aimed at boosting Permian basin gas processing and US Gulf Coast fractionation. The company will build the 300-MMcfd Zeus gas processing plant and the Midland Express (MEX) pipeline in the Permian, alongside a third fractionator, Coast Bend Fractionator 3 (CBF3), at its USGC Coastal Bend operations. These projects, slated for 2028 completion, are part of Phillips 66's strategy to enhance its integrated NGL wellhead-to-market strategy, support growing Permian production, and align with its capital spending and debt reduct
articles.content: Phillips 66 is expanding its midstream capabilities with two new projects aimed at boosting Permian basin gas processing and US Gulf Coast fractionation. The company will build the 300-MMcfd Zeus gas processing plant and the Midland Express (MEX) pipeline in the Permian, alongside a third fractionator, Coast Bend Fractionator 3 (CBF3), at its USGC Coastal Bend operations. These projects, slated for 2028 completion, are part of Phillips 66's strategy to enhance its integrated NGL wellhead-to-market strategy, support growing Permian production, and align with its capital spending and debt reduction goals.

articles.title: FIS: BankSouth Chooses FIS for Enhanced Banking Solutions
articles.summary: FIS (Fidelity National Information Services Inc) has been selected by BankSouth to modernize its retail and business banking operations, integrating AI features and third-party fintech solutions. This collaboration aims to streamline operations and enhance customer service, aligning with BankSouth's growth plans. Despite a lower financial strength rating, FIS holds a solid GF Score™ of 70, reflecting strong profitability and growth, and insider buying activity indicates confidence in its future performance.

articles.title: This Cigna Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 4 Downgrades For Wednesday
articles.summary: Several Wall Street analysts have downgraded their ratings for four major companies. Deutsche Bank downgraded Cigna Group (CI) from Buy to Hold, Morgan Stanley downgraded Newell Brands Inc (NWL) from Equal-Weight to Underweight, Wolfe Research downgraded Crown Castle Inc (CCI) from Outperform to Peer Perform, and Seaport Global downgraded Dominion Energy Inc (D) from Buy to Neutral. These downgrades reflect changing outlooks on these stocks by top financial analysts.
articles.content: Several Wall Street analysts have downgraded their ratings for four major companies. Deutsche Bank downgraded Cigna Group (CI) from Buy to Hold, Morgan Stanley downgraded Newell Brands Inc (NWL) from Equal-Weight to Underweight, Wolfe Research downgraded Crown Castle Inc (CCI) from Outperform to Peer Perform, and Seaport Global downgraded Dominion Energy Inc (D) from Buy to Neutral. These downgrades reflect changing outlooks on these stocks by top financial analysts.

articles.title: Here’s What Weighed on Southwest Airlines Co. (LUV) Shares in Q1
articles.summary: Sound Shore Management released its Q1 2026 investor letter, highlighting Southwest Airlines Co. (LUV) as a full position despite market concerns over rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions impacting consumer discretionary and travel stocks. The firm believes Southwest Airlines Co. has a strong balance sheet and is benefiting from multiyear restructurings driving improved earnings. Although still a significant holding, Sound Shore Fund suggests that certain AI stocks may offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

articles.title: Invest in These 5 Big Data Behemoths to Gain From Wall Street Rally
articles.summary: This article identifies five "Big Data Behemoths" that are poised for growth amidst a Wall Street rally: Cisco Systems Inc. (CSCO), Salesforce Inc. (CRM), Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR), Cloudflare Inc. (NET), and Datadog Inc. (DDOG). Each company holds a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) and is discussed in terms of their strategies and growth prospects within the big data and AI sectors. The article emphasizes their focus on processing, storing, and analyzing data, along with providing data mining, transformation, visualization, and predictive analytics tools.
